title: LSE staged AI policy source review
summary: Staged one-university crawl for The London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE), QS 2026 rank 56, United Kingdom. The run found official English-language LSE guidance covering assessment positions, observed assessment safeguards, available AI tools, research use, privacy/security restrictions, and Claude/Copilot tool boundaries. All claims are staged candidates only and are not canonical.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This run used public official LSE sources discovered with Firecrawl search and fetched with Firecrawl; it did not access login-required or restricted systems.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
